productDisplayName: U.S. Polo Assn. Men Printed Black Tshirt
description: Composition Black round neck T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves, distresed graphic print and applique work on the front, and has a vented hem Fitting Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent Do not wring, bleach, or iron on print Flat dry in shade Ramp up your style quotient with this stylish T-shirt from US Polo. The distressed print on the front pays tribute to classic fashion, while the cotton fabric offers exemplary comfort. Pair it with denims and suede shoes.
